title: Anyone found Kaworu Nagisa Education Project was mindblown

wikitext:
[]: Anyone found Kaworu Nagisa Education Project was mindblown?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Sat Mar 27, 2021 11:56 pm The plot really shocked me because the majority of Shinji Raising Project was reasonable. Other than Kaworu's plot, I don't think he should be so hungry on Shinji at all. But THIS really shocked me. SPOILER: Show
